summary: The diff implements most of the required changes: AdminLoginPage pre-seeds the 'Munnu1998@' password via SHA-256 hashing, AdminGuard shows a first-admin registration prompt, and useAdminRegistration.ts provides hooks for first-admin registration. However, the backend main.mo is truncated and it is unclear whether the auto-promotion logic (no-auth check when adminCount==0) is fully implemented there. The REQ-2 AC requiring the backend verifyAuthentication to accept the SHA-256 hash of 'Munnu1998@' cannot be confirmed from the truncated diff. Additionally, a migration.mo file was added which appears unrelated to the stated requirements.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the backend so that when no admin account exists yet, the first user who calls a registration or login endpoint is automatically promoted to admin role without requiring prior authorization.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the implementation of auto-promotion logic (e.g., a registerFirstAdmin function or a no-auth check when adminCount==0). The frontend calls actor.registerFirstAdmin() but whether the backend implements this with the correct no-auth guard cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: The backend verifyAuthentication method accepts the SHA-256 hash of 'Munnu1998@' as valid credentials for the first admin account.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo is truncated and does not show the verifyAuthentication method or any logic that would accept the SHA-256 hash of 'Munnu1998@'. While the frontend seeds the password correctly, backend acceptance cannot be confirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration.mo module was added to handle schema migration of registrationMethod from variant types to Text types.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any data migration or schema change for registrationMethod fields. This is an unrequested addition.
